gaps.description: M1: Remote profiles from CDN with local cache (src/detector/profiles.js)
M1: Ollama auto-install and model pull (src/detector/ollama.js, src/cli/setup.js)
M1: Web UI minimal chat dialog (src/ui/client/)
M1: One-click install script — cli/setup.js exists but npx entrypoint completeness unverified
M2: STT integration — SenseVoice/Whisper/cloud fallback (src/runtime/stt.js); agentic-voice dependency not confirmed installed
M2: TTS integration — Kokoro/Piper/cloud fallback (src/runtime/tts.js); agentic-voice dependency not confirmed installed
M2: Push-to-talk UI (PushToTalk.vue) and VAD composable (useVAD.js)
M2: Wake word — WakeWord.vue + useWakeWord.js present; server-side mic capture pipeline unverified
M3: WebSocket device registration and heartbeat (src/server/hub.js)
M3: Visual perception via agentic-sense (src/runtime/sense.js); external package dependency unverified
M3: Admin panel with device list, logs, hardware, config (src/ui/admin/)
M4: Cloud fallback to OpenAI/Anthropic (src/runtime/llm.js, src/server/brain.js)
M4: Config hot-update from remote profiles (src/detector/profiles.js)
M4: Docker / docker-compose deployment — no docker files found in project root
M4: Complete user documentation/README — no README.md found in project root
